item.title: 棋子還是塞子？為什麼美國要援助臺灣？美緣博弈下的中華民國！蔣介石最恨馬歇爾？Why did the U.S. support the ROC#639 ‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:title: 棋子還是塞子？為什麼美國要援助臺灣？美緣博弈下的中華民國！蔣介石最恨馬歇爾？Why did the U.S. support the ROC#639 ‪@mynotebooks
item.itunes:author: 我的學習筆記
item.itunes:summary:
開場白

大家好！我是牛哥。美國已經進入了川普2.0時代。無論你是反美、懷疑論者，還是親美的，都無法否認這一點。美國對我們來說，是一個重量級的國家，我們的未來、命運，甚至生死，在某種程度上都與美國息息相關。之前我們做過很多關於中美關係的影片，比如美國的「擁抱熊貓」、杜魯門停止對蔣介石的軍事援助，以及人們為什麼會有懷疑美的理論等等。有興趣的朋友可以去找來看。今天，牛哥要講的話題是：在動盪的1950年代，中華民國究竟是棋子，還是插座？

馬歇爾調停與美國的態度

1945年12月，美國總統杜魯門任命退役陸軍參謀長馬歇爾將軍為特使，調停國共之間的爭端。馬歇爾抵達中國，希望蔣介石停止內戰，召開各方會議，討論統一方案。然而，經過近一年的調停，馬歇爾的任務失敗了。他憤怒地認為是國民黨拒絕停火合作，並請求杜魯門停止對華援助，導致國民黨的物資供應陷入困境。馬歇爾調停失敗後，回到美國被杜魯門任命為國務卿，這也為蔣介石在內戰中的失敗埋下了伏筆。

內戰局勢與美國援助

1948年，內戰的天平開始傾向中共，國民黨的軍事行動接連受挫，國民黨控制區內通貨膨脹、民不聊生、物價飛漲、金融崩潰。國民黨急需美國援助。但在馬歇爾的影響下，白宮傾向於不提供軍事援助，而向歐洲提供大量經濟援助。國會和白宮在對華援助問題上存在分歧。為了平息國會的情緒，馬歇爾不得不提出一項僅有經濟援助而沒有軍事援助的計劃，理由是擔心提供軍事援助會引發蘇聯的報復，進而導致第三次世界大戰。

《援華法案》的通過與妥協

但實際上，馬歇爾提供的經濟援助，遠小於歐洲復興計劃，只能延緩中國經濟惡化的速度，給予蔣介石喘息的機會。杜魯門政府實際上是故意觀望著蔣介石的失敗。由於馬歇爾版的援華法案沒有軍事援助，國會為了制衡，支持中國的國會議員甚至寫信給馬歇爾，要求他加速對華軍事援助，否則將會超支。最終，在將援華計劃、歐洲復興計劃、以及對華軍事援助合併成一項議案後，促成了《援華法案》的通過。

《援華法案》的實施與困境

1948年4月2日，美國國會通過了60億美元的對外援助法案，其中對華援助總額為4.63億美元，包括1.25億美元的“特殊禮物”。“特殊禮物”實際上是軍事援助。由於馬歇爾堅持不提供軍事援助，這顯然是美國國會為了保全杜魯門政府的面子，以及國務院與國會之間的妥協。在《援華法案》通過後，需要獲得國會撥款委員會的批准。參議院撥款委員會舉行秘密會議，馬歇爾的國務院提交了一份書面報告，用最悲觀的語氣表達了對中華民國軍事、政治、經濟形勢的看法，認為援助中國除了浪費金錢外，不僅不能幫助中國，反而會損害美國的國際聲譽。最終，對華援助的金額被削減，而軍事援助的金額保持不變，這表明了美國國會對中華民國政府的否定態度。

援助的實際效果與國民黨的困境

之後，中美簽訂了經濟援助協定。但簽訂後，國民政府在內戰中失利。待中央政府退守台灣後，美國實際只支出了1.7億美元。美國國務院始終對援助蔣介石持反對態度。馬歇爾認為，在現任領導人的領導下，中國毫無希望，援助也無法拯救。馬歇爾認為經濟援助是被浪費的，軍事援助的武器也間接流入了共產黨手中。因為中國軍隊訓練不足，中國唯一的希望是改變領導層。

美國援助的武器問題與蔣介石的努力

抗日戰爭勝利後，國民黨軍隊接收了美式裝備和訓練，美式武器擁有強大的火力，但彈藥消耗迅速，後勤供應要求高。在內戰中，國民黨的兵工廠無法生產美式彈藥。無法及時補充彈藥，美式裝備就成了廢鐵。負責接收東北的第13軍軍長石覺透露，第13軍在抗戰結束時，換裝了美式裝備，最初收到了3個月的彈藥。但從1945年底國民黨收復錦州後，就沒有彈藥補充。美式步槍與國民黨的步槍口徑不同，兩種彈藥不能互換使用。而且，裝備美式武器的國民黨軍隊，每人只能配備10發子彈。

宋美齡赴美游說與援助的最終結果

由於形勢危急，蔣介石為了盡快獲得美國援助，曾兩次致電杜魯門，懇請加快對華軍事援助。第一批軍事物資，在《援華法案》通過7個月後，於1948年11月運抵中國。根據時任聯合後勤副總司令黃仁霖的回憶，1949年1月，在北平失守前，曾向華北剿總司令傅作義移交了550噸軍火。這批軍火價值1.25億美元，是《援華法案》的第一批援助。蔣介石通過黃葛向傅作義保證，後續的軍火將源源不斷地運抵。但幾天後，傅作義開城投降，這批援華物資也落入了中共手中。宋美齡親自赴美游說。但杜魯門對宋美齡的遊說回應有限。最终，美國對華援助的力度和效率都遠遠未能達到國民黨的需求。

Beef tallow, etc. To make up for the shortage of consumer goods. Defense spending is huge. Foreign exchange shortage. Demand outstrips supply. Leading to inflation. It can be seen from this. US aid in all aspects. All of them have helped us. Very critical role. So much so that our sister Meiling. In 1954, I would say with emotion.

US aid. It's a matter of life and death for us. Let’s look back at history. August 1949. The United States publishes a white paper on China. January 1950. Truman issues arms embargo. The Korean War broke out in June of the same year. Truman declares Taiwan Strait neutral. May 1951. US military advisory group visits Taiwan. February 1953. President Eisenhower lifts Taiwan Strait neutralization. To combat communist forces. Threats and Expansion. The Republic of China became. Resilience Tools in the United States. Taiwan has become. Pawns in the Game of Great Powers. U.S. Policy Toward China. With different periods of. Changes in American interests. But the goals of the United States and Chiang Kai-shek. Actually, they are all the same. All to stop. The expansion of communism. If Truman had started from realism. Rather than being emotional. Assist the National Government as soon as possible. Rather than avoiding. Abandon negative attitude. Maybe you can avoid it later. The United States spent a huge price. To bear the responsibility. The responsibility of communism. Of course, after the victory of the Anti-Japanese War. On one hand, the war between the Kuomintang and the Communist Party has reignited. On one hand, the war between the Kuomintang. and the Communist Party has reignited. On the one hand, the government's administration is not good. Official corruption sparks U.S. dissatisfaction. Refusal to provide military aid. But more. It seems Marshall. The feud with Chiang Kai-shek. Become an influencer in China. Major factors in the historical process. Ma Ge in January 1947. By January 1949. Served as Secretary of State. September 1950. By September 1951. Served as Minister of Defense. In charge of our military aid. Power of life and death. Ma Ge's successful career. Smooth sailing. But in mediating the Kuomintang-Communist Civil War. Return with Failure. From then on, he bore a grudge against Chiang Kai-shek. Reluctance to provide more aid. And our great man Chiang. For the sake of the overall situation. No public abuse. Choose to vent in a diary. Considered by Europe. Marshall, the father of reconstruction. Became Chiang Kai-shek's lifelong. One of the three most hated people. Our National Revolutionary Army. Never for the sake of reporting. A family feud. There is no calculation of interests by Western politicians. Only again and again. Heading into the Bad Waters. To complete the century-old pursuit of the martyrs. Use your own life to interpret. What is comradeship? The meaning of nation. Love of country. And what about us today? For the Reconstruction of the Republic. Do you still have any hope? We also know that armed counterattack. It's very difficult. But why do we. I haven't given up yet. To make freedom and democracy. Bring it back to China? Because we have always had a dream. A dream for the Chinese people to be masters of their own country. Today, 1.4 billion people. As long as 10,000 people are willing to stand up. At the same time, motivate and drive. The forces within the CCP stand up. Embrace universal values. Transforming the Chinese Communist Party. through Democratic Transformation. The Third Glorious Revolution of the Republic of China. It's not impossible. alright. Today's story. Let's stop here for now. If you like this episode. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks. In addition, our DC group is now open. Welcome everyone to come in and chat. My study notes. See you next time. ByeBye.

今天阿牛哥要帶大家穿越回那個風雨飄搖的 1950 年代，一起來看看中華民國到底是美蘇冷戰下的「棋子」？還是被人死死堵住的「塞子」？

這一集從「蔣公痛恨的三人組之一」——馬歇爾將軍開始講起。當年他奉命來華調停國共內戰，最後卻大罵國民政府不配合，轉頭回美國要杜魯門斷絕援助，讓國軍陷入補給困境，直接左右了國共戰局的走向！

而接下來那幾年，美國內部對「要不要援助中華民國」吵翻天，馬歇爾不想幫、國會想幫、蔣公天天求援，連宋美齡都親自飛去美國拜託…結果援助真的來了，卻只來了一次，還直接掉進共產黨的手裡？😱

item.description:
開場白

大家好！我是牛哥。美國已經進入了川普2.0時代。無論你是反美、懷疑論者，還是親美的，都無法否認這一點。美國對我們來說，是一個重量級的國家，我們的未來、命運，甚至生死，在某種程度上都與美國息息相關。之前我們做過很多關於中美關係的影片，比如美國的「擁抱熊貓」、杜魯門停止對蔣介石的軍事援助，以及人們為什麼會有懷疑美的理論等等。有興趣的朋友可以去找來看。今天，牛哥要講的話題是：在動盪的1950年代，中華民國究竟是棋子，還是插座？

馬歇爾調停與美國的態度

1945年12月，美國總統杜魯門任命退役陸軍參謀長馬歇爾將軍為特使，調停國共之間的爭端。馬歇爾抵達中國，希望蔣介石停止內戰，召開各方會議，討論統一方案。然而，經過近一年的調停，馬歇爾的任務失敗了。他憤怒地認為是國民黨拒絕停火合作，並請求杜魯門停止對華援助，導致國民黨的物資供應陷入困境。馬歇爾調停失敗後，回到美國被杜魯門任命為國務卿，這也為蔣介石在內戰中的失敗埋下了伏筆。

內戰局勢與美國援助

1948年，內戰的天平開始傾向中共，國民黨的軍事行動接連受挫，國民黨控制區內通貨膨脹、民不聊生、物價飛漲、金融崩潰。國民黨急需美國援助。但在馬歇爾的影響下，白宮傾向於不提供軍事援助，而向歐洲提供大量經濟援助。國會和白宮在對華援助問題上存在分歧。為了平息國會的情緒，馬歇爾不得不提出一項僅有經濟援助而沒有軍事援助的計劃，理由是擔心提供軍事援助會引發蘇聯的報復，進而導致第三次世界大戰。

《援華法案》的通過與妥協

但實際上，馬歇爾提供的經濟援助，遠小於歐洲復興計劃，只能延緩中國經濟惡化的速度，給予蔣介石喘息的機會。杜魯門政府實際上是故意觀望著蔣介石的失敗。由於馬歇爾版的援華法案沒有軍事援助，國會為了制衡，支持中國的國會議員甚至寫信給馬歇爾，要求他加速對華軍事援助，否則將會超支。最終，在將援華計劃、歐洲復興計劃、以及對華軍事援助合併成一項議案後，促成了《援華法案》的通過。

《援華法案》的實施與困境

1948年4月2日，美國國會通過了60億美元的對外援助法案，其中對華援助總額為4.63億美元，包括1.25億美元的“特殊禮物”。“特殊禮物”實際上是軍事援助。由於馬歇爾堅持不提供軍事援助，這顯然是美國國會為了保全杜魯門政府的面子，以及國務院與國會之間的妥協。在《援華法案》通過後，需要獲得國會撥款委員會的批准。參議院撥款委員會舉行秘密會議，馬歇爾的國務院提交了一份書面報告，用最悲觀的語氣表達了對中華民國軍事、政治、經濟形勢的看法，認為援助中國除了浪費金錢外，不僅不能幫助中國，反而會損害美國的國際聲譽。最終，對華援助的金額被削減，而軍事援助的金額保持不變，這表明了美國國會對中華民國政府的否定態度。

援助的實際效果與國民黨的困境

之後，中美簽訂了經濟援助協定。但簽訂後，國民政府在內戰中失利。待中央政府退守台灣後，美國實際只支出了1.7億美元。美國國務院始終對援助蔣介石持反對態度。馬歇爾認為，在現任領導人的領導下，中國毫無希望，援助也無法拯救。馬歇爾認為經濟援助是被浪費的，軍事援助的武器也間接流入了共產黨手中。因為中國軍隊訓練不足，中國唯一的希望是改變領導層。

美國援助的武器問題與蔣介石的努力

抗日戰爭勝利後，國民黨軍隊接收了美式裝備和訓練，美式武器擁有強大的火力，但彈藥消耗迅速，後勤供應要求高。在內戰中，國民黨的兵工廠無法生產美式彈藥。無法及時補充彈藥，美式裝備就成了廢鐵。負責接收東北的第13軍軍長石覺透露，第13軍在抗戰結束時，換裝了美式裝備，最初收到了3個月的彈藥。但從1945年底國民黨收復錦州後，就沒有彈藥補充。美式步槍與國民黨的步槍口徑不同，兩種彈藥不能互換使用。而且，裝備美式武器的國民黨軍隊，每人只能配備10發子彈。

宋美齡赴美游說與援助的最終結果

由於形勢危急，蔣介石為了盡快獲得美國援助，曾兩次致電杜魯門，懇請加快對華軍事援助。第一批軍事物資，在《援華法案》通過7個月後，於1948年11月運抵中國。根據時任聯合後勤副總司令黃仁霖的回憶，1949年1月，在北平失守前，曾向華北剿總司令傅作義移交了550噸軍火。這批軍火價值1.25億美元，是《援華法案》的第一批援助。蔣介石通過黃葛向傅作義保證，後續的軍火將源源不斷地運抵。但幾天後，傅作義開城投降，這批援華物資也落入了中共手中。宋美齡親自赴美游說。但杜魯門對宋美齡的遊說回應有限。最终，美國對華援助的力度和效率都遠遠未能達到國民黨的需求。
================================================

Visiting Marshall who was ill. December 10. Meiling visits Duge. Three requests were made. 1: Published a statement in support of the Nanjing government. Anti-Communist and National Salvation Declaration. 2: Send a high-level military delegation. Come to China to formulate a battle plan. And logistics supply and other work. 3: Hope Washington. More assistance available. Dugo answered. Sino-US friendship in history. It left an important page. But I'm sorry. Because the United States can only give. $400 million already pledged. Until it runs out. Can’t support China indefinitely. January 1949. Marshall resigned as Secretary of State. Acheson. Figure out Dugo's true intention. That means "standing idly by" towards China. In August, the United States announced. White Paper on China-U.S. Relations. Strongly criticized Chiang Kai-shek. or his incompetence in governing the country. The Kuomintang-Communist War will fail. It's a leadership issue. Nothing to do with the United States.

Acheson believes. Before the "dust settles" Unpredictable future for China. Aid to China. Negative wait-and-see attitude. The White Paper defends the United States. China policy. Severely criticized Chiang Kai-shek. Also cited in May 1949. Li Zongren wrote to. A passage from Du Ge's letter. In his letter, Ren Ge pointed out. Chiang Kai-shek was careless in his use of American aid. Failure to implement proper politics. economy. Military Reform. With the help of the United States. Failed to achieve the expected effect. These failures of Chiang Kai-shek's government. The United States is currently. Reasons for the predicament. In order to strike at Chiang Kai-shek. Ren Ge as the Acting President of the Republic of China. The U.S. government. Criticizing China for improper use of US aid. Despite the change of leadership. But the Republic of China has. Still an actual individual. For personal gain. Ignoring the overall interests of the country. Admitting the mistake in black and white. Seriously harmed China's interests. I can only say that it really doesn't work. You really hurt the disaster. Let the villain in "The Founding of a Republic" win. March 1950. Our great man Chiang Kai-shek. Announced to resume duties in Taipei. Taiwan is in a state of disrepair at this time. The situation is precarious. Du Ge refused to comment on the issue of aid. The State Department is Stopping Communism. While expanding into Southeast Asia. Still looking forward to meeting Mao Fei. Establishing diplomatic relations. January 1950. Truman issued a statement. The United States. has no intention of intervening in China's civil war. Nor will they provide military aid or advice. To the Chinese troops in Taiwan. To execute Truman. Our policy of prohibiting military aid. Any indirect contribution to improving. Our military force plan. Will not pass. Even to the point of perversion. Like we want to buy a. The iron bridge with a load capacity of 16 tons. The first thing that came to the United States was. Will it also allow. Medium tanks pass. Because commercial vehicles. Only a bridge with a load capacity of 10 tons is needed. And rice and cloth. The United States also opposes aid to us. Think it is possible to use. On the National Army. It became indirect military aid. This abnormal restriction. It was not until the Korean War broke out that it ended. June 25, 1950. Korean War breaks out. October: CCP joins the war. The hostile stance. between the Communist Party and the United States is determined. The State Council still opposes. Chiang Kai-shek's leadership. However, under strong pressure from both home and abroad,. US Aid to China. Entering a period of transition. After the Korean War. The Seventh Fleet cruises the Taiwan Strait. Strengthening our defenses. Preventing the CCP from invading Taiwan. It has become a top priority for the United States. Then the United States allowed us. Buy with cash from the US. Purely for the defense of Taiwan. Selected weapons and supplies needed. By November. About $10 million. Small arms ammunition. Delivered to Taipei. But Truman sent officials. Privately tell Chiang Kai-shek. This policy is effective in the short term. In the future. The evolution of the situation in the Far East. January 1951. The United Nations General Assembly declared. Communist China is an invader. On the same day,. the United States submitted a note to Chiang Kai-shek. Willing to send a military advisory group to Taiwan. Defend against possible communist attacks. But Chiang knew it well. This does not represent Dugo's attitude. Changes. Rather, it proves that Sino-US relations. Will be determined based on the security interests of the United States. Since January 1949. US military advisory group.

After evacuating Nanjing. Chiang Kai-shek kept writing letters. Tell Big Brother America. Hope to be able to. Send a military advisory group. Come help us, the Republic of China. May 1, 1951. The advisory group has not been seen for more than 2 years. Officially established. As part of the U.S. Embassy in Taiwan. The advisory group will provide military advice. Monitoring the use of U.S. aid. and assist in technical cooperation. The arrival of the advisory group. Shows that the United States is supporting us. The nature of the short-term transition. Become a long-term stable plan. And from the second half of 1951. Taiwan's internal situation gradually stabilizes. In the minds of American policymakers. Taiwan gradually turns from a liability into an asset. The United States doesn't have to pay much. We can use Taiwan. As a tool to prevent the expansion of the Chinese Communist Party. Taiwan's position is solid. Contribute to U.S. defense interests. This also made our great man Jiang Gong. Also began in front of the United States. Straighten your back. 1953. The US military advisory group required. The National Army reforms its political work system. And stopped immediately. Military aid to political workers. Like a vehicle. Gasoline, etc. Because the United States feels. The political work system originated from the Soviet Union. But Jiang Gong felt. The reason why he was defeated on the mainland. Because of the army. No centripetal force. So Chiang Kai-shek still followed the planned policy. Refute with reason. Don't let the Stilwell story come back. After all, Stilwell. Let us suffer enough. We have wiped out all our elite troops. Finally we succeeded. The Political Work System of the National Army. October 1951. The United States enacts the Mutual Security Act. Past foreign aid programs to revive the European economy. Integrated into a Cold War approach against the Soviet Union. Mainly from financial assistance. Transformed to military assistance. Joint Security Agency. Replaced the old Economic Cooperation Administration. Manage all foreign aid affairs. In fiscal year 1952, the United States. Provided to the Republic of China. About $280 million in military spending. Economic and technical assistance. American aid is no longer just. Currency cash. It also includes military aid in the form of weapons and ammunition. Physical goods as economic aid. Like cans of flour or something. The purpose of U.S. economic aid. is promoting the recipient countries. Self-help spirit. To balance the budget. Need to formulate a military reduction. Plan with administrative budget. But only the administrative budget was cut. Not much help. It only accounts for the central government. 15% of budget. The remaining 85% is used by the military. In order to effectively use military aid. The US military advisory group requested. Close monitoring of military aid. Many generals of the National Army opposed. I think the United States is. Interfering in our internal affairs. But Chiang Kai-shek believed. This has an impact on administrative efficiency. It is helpful to verify the income and expenditure. So we allowed the US advisory group to participate. Military budgeting and accounting. Hope to be completely rectified. Corruption and waste in the national army. To help Taiwan develop its economy. The United States since 1951. Use of financial aid. Training Taiwanese administrators in the United States. Technicians and experts. Trainees come from various government departments. Covering agriculture. industry. Education, transportation, etc. Staff training is the key to effective governance. and successful execution. The basis for the reform plan. Can make the Republic of China stronger. Self-reliance. Becoming a strong ally of the United States. On the surface. This assistance is for. Direct assistance to people of other countries. But at the same time. The United States also benefited. The U.S. Economy and National Security.

You can't rely entirely on yourself. Cooperation and support from other countries. This is also indispensable. As for economic development? America needs other countries too. Can produce more products. Sell ​​more stuff. Training foreign talents. It is a very far-sighted policy. 1953. Republican President Eisenhower takes office. Renewed Sino-US friendly relations. Military aid equipment shipment speed. Significantly faster. Advanced jet fighters provided by the United States. Also started to be delivered to Taiwan. Soon after, Ige announced. Lifting the policy of neutralization of the Taiwan Strait. This is the Truman era. Covering up the CCP. Stop Chiang Kai-shek from attacking the mainland. Removal of restrictions. Ai Ge's statement to Chiang Kai-shek. Provides a good opportunity for publicity. President Eisenhower. Disbanding Taiwan's armed forces. Decision to limit. Whether in politics or military. and in terms of international morality. These are the most reasonable. and brightest moves by the United States. To calm people's hearts. Boosting morale. Then the U.S. Senate and House of Representatives. A joint meeting was held. Through 1954. Foreign Aid Act. Total US aid to Taiwan. Reached more than 300 million US dollars. But then Chiang Kai-shek immediately discovered. Although the United States has increased its aid to us. But in the planning of counterattack on the mainland. The United States has no specific. Positive Action and Commitment. Because the national army at that time. There is no power to counterattack alone. The United States cancels the ban on the National Army. The real intention of counterattacking the mainland. It is to put pressure on Mao Zedong. Let him transfer some troops from North Korea. To the southeast coast of the occupied area. Thus weakening the CCP. The force that invaded Korea. I just want to end it early. Korean War. According to statistics. Since 1949. Until July 1, 1965. The United States "stopped because our economy improved" Until the end of the aid. The economic part of US aid. The total amount is about 1.7 billion US dollars. Taiwan receives about US$100 million per year. At the price of that year. In terms of Taiwan's economic size. This is a very huge amount of money. It's like buying us out. Financial aid to the Republic of China. It has had a profound impact. It also affects us. The direction of economic development. Military aid is also. Terminated in 1973. The content of the military aid is also relatively simple. Mostly weapons and ammunition. Equipment and military supplies, etc. Some information is confidential. So the types and numbers of military aid. It remains a mystery. Only the total amount of military aid is known. About $2.3 billion. Mainly started in. 1953, after Truman stepped down. Because a large number of soldiers and civilians. Following the central government's retreat to Taiwan. From 1948 to 1951. Population of Taiwan. An increase of 1.33 million people. The population has increased significantly in a short period of time. This caused a shortage of supplies in Taiwan. Need to import daily necessities. Like cotton. soy. wheat. flour. Beef tallow, etc. To make up for the shortage of consumer goods. Defense spending is huge. Foreign exchange shortage. Demand outstrips supply. Leading to inflation. When the Republic of China was on the brink of extinction. Korean War breaks out. American aid is coming back. Taiwan's price increase rate. From 57% in 1951. It dropped to 4.5% in 1953. It can be seen from this. US aid in all aspects. All of them have helped us. Very critical role. So much so that our sister Meiling. In 1954, I would say with emotion.

US aid. It's a matter of life and death for us. Let’s look back at history. August 1949. The United States publishes a white paper on China. January 1950. Truman issues arms embargo. The Korean War broke out in June of the same year. Truman declares Taiwan Strait neutral. May 1951. US military advisory group visits Taiwan. February 1953. President Eisenhower lifts Taiwan Strait neutralization. To combat communist forces. Threats and Expansion. The Republic of China became. Resilience Tools in the United States. Taiwan has become. Pawns in the Game of Great Powers. U.S. Policy Toward China. With different periods of. Changes in American interests. But the goals of the United States and Chiang Kai-shek. Actually, they are all the same. All to stop. The expansion of communism. If Truman had started from realism. Rather than being emotional. Assist the National Government as soon as possible. Rather than avoiding. Abandon negative attitude. Maybe you can avoid it later. The United States spent a huge price. To bear the responsibility. The responsibility of communism. Of course, after the victory of the Anti-Japanese War. On one hand, the war between the Kuomintang and the Communist Party has reignited. On one hand, the war between the Kuomintang. and the Communist Party has reignited. On the one hand, the government's administration is not good. Official corruption sparks U.S. dissatisfaction. Refusal to provide military aid. But more. It seems Marshall. The feud with Chiang Kai-shek. Become an influencer in China. Major factors in the historical process. Ma Ge in January 1947. By January 1949. Served as Secretary of State. September 1950. By September 1951. Served as Minister of Defense. In charge of our military aid. Power of life and death. Ma Ge's successful career. Smooth sailing. But in mediating the Kuomintang-Communist Civil War. Return with Failure. From then on, he bore a grudge against Chiang Kai-shek. Reluctance to provide more aid. And our great man Chiang. For the sake of the overall situation. No public abuse. Choose to vent in a diary. Considered by Europe. Marshall, the father of reconstruction. Became Chiang Kai-shek's lifelong. One of the three most hated people. Our National Revolutionary Army. Never for the sake of reporting. A family feud. There is no calculation of interests by Western politicians. Only again and again. Heading into the Bad Waters. To complete the century-old pursuit of the martyrs. Use your own life to interpret. What is comradeship? The meaning of nation. Love of country. And what about us today? For the Reconstruction of the Republic. Do you still have any hope? We also know that armed counterattack. It's very difficult. But why do we. I haven't given up yet. To make freedom and democracy. Bring it back to China? Because we have always had a dream. A dream for the Chinese people to be masters of their own country. Today, 1.4 billion people. As long as 10,000 people are willing to stand up. At the same time, motivate and drive. The forces within the CCP stand up. Embrace universal values. Transforming the Chinese Communist Party. through Democratic Transformation. The Third Glorious Revolution of the Republic of China. It's not impossible. alright. Today's story. Let's stop here for now. If you like this episode. Please help us press the subscribe button and share it. If you have capable friends. You can also join our membership. Or click Super Thanks. In addition, our DC group is now open. Welcome everyone to come in and chat. My study notes. See you next time. ByeBye.

item.content:encoded:
開場白

大家好！我是牛哥。美國已經進入了川普2.0時代。無論你是反美、懷疑論者，還是親美的，都無法否認這一點。美國對我們來說，是一個重量級的國家，我們的未來、命運，甚至生死，在某種程度上都與美國息息相關。之前我們做過很多關於中美關係的影片，比如美國的「擁抱熊貓」、杜魯門停止對蔣介石的軍事援助，以及人們為什麼會有懷疑美的理論等等。有興趣的朋友可以去找來看。今天，牛哥要講的話題是：在動盪的1950年代，中華民國究竟是棋子，還是插座？

馬歇爾調停與美國的態度

1945年12月，美國總統杜魯門任命退役陸軍參謀長馬歇爾將軍為特使，調停國共之間的爭端。馬歇爾抵達中國，希望蔣介石停止內戰，召開各方會議，討論統一方案。然而，經過近一年的調停，馬歇爾的任務失敗了。他憤怒地認為是國民黨拒絕停火合作，並請求杜魯門停止對華援助，導致國民黨的物資供應陷入困境。馬歇爾調停失敗後，回到美國被杜魯門任命為國務卿，這也為蔣介石在內戰中的失敗埋下了伏筆。

內戰局勢與美國援助

1948年，內戰的天平開始傾向中共，國民黨的軍事行動接連受挫，國民黨控制區內通貨膨脹、民不聊生、物價飛漲、金融崩潰。國民黨急需美國援助。但在馬歇爾的影響下，白宮傾向於不提供軍事援助，而向歐洲提供大量經濟援助。國會和白宮在對華援助問題上存在分歧。為了平息國會的情緒，馬歇爾不得不提出一項僅有經濟援助而沒有軍事援助的計劃，理由是擔心提供軍事援助會引發蘇聯的報復，進而導致第三次世界大戰。

《援華法案》的通過與妥協

但實際上，馬歇爾提供的經濟援助，遠小於歐洲復興計劃，只能延緩中國經濟惡化的速度，給予蔣介石喘息的機會。杜魯門政府實際上是故意觀望著蔣介石的失敗。由於馬歇爾版的援華法案沒有軍事援助，國會為了制衡，支持中國的國會議員甚至寫信給馬歇爾，要求他加速對華軍事援助，否則將會超支。最終，在將援華計劃、歐洲復興計劃、以及對華軍事援助合併成一項議案後，促成了《援華法案》的通過。

《援華法案》的實施與困境

1948年4月2日，美國國會通過了60億美元的對外援助法案，其中對華援助總額為4.63億美元，包括1.25億美元的“特殊禮物”。“特殊禮物”實際上是軍事援助。由於馬歇爾堅持不提供軍事援助，這顯然是美國國會為了保全杜魯門政府的面子，以及國務院與國會之間的妥協。在《援華法案》通過後，需要獲得國會撥款委員會的批准。參議院撥款委員會舉行秘密會議，馬歇爾的國務院提交了一份書面報告，用最悲觀的語氣表達了對中華民國軍事、政治、經濟形勢的看法，認為援助中國除了浪費金錢外，不僅不能幫助中國，反而會損害美國的國際聲譽。最終，對華援助的金額被削減，而軍事援助的金額保持不變，這表明了美國國會對中華民國政府的否定態度。

援助的實際效果與國民黨的困境

之後，中美簽訂了經濟援助協定。但簽訂後，國民政府在內戰中失利。待中央政府退守台灣後，美國實際只支出了1.7億美元。美國國務院始終對援助蔣介石持反對態度。馬歇爾認為，在現任領導人的領導下，中國毫無希望，援助也無法拯救。馬歇爾認為經濟援助是被浪費的，軍事援助的武器也間接流入了共產黨手中。因為中國軍隊訓練不足，中國唯一的希望是改變領導層。

美國援助的武器問題與蔣介石的努力

抗日戰爭勝利後，國民黨軍隊接收了美式裝備和訓練，美式武器擁有強大的火力，但彈藥消耗迅速，後勤供應要求高。在內戰中，國民黨的兵工廠無法生產美式彈藥。無法及時補充彈藥，美式裝備就成了廢鐵。負責接收東北的第13軍軍長石覺透露，第13軍在抗戰結束時，換裝了美式裝備，最初收到了3個月的彈藥。但從1945年底國民黨收復錦州後，就沒有彈藥補充。美式步槍與國民黨的步槍口徑不同，兩種彈藥不能互換使用。而且，裝備美式武器的國民黨軍隊，每人只能配備10發子彈。

宋美齡赴美游說與援助的最終結果

由於形勢危急，蔣介石為了盡快獲得美國援助，曾兩次致電杜魯門，懇請加快對華軍事援助。第一批軍事物資，在《援華法案》通過7個月後，於1948年11月運抵中國。根據時任聯合後勤副總司令黃仁霖的回憶，1949年1月，在北平失守前，曾向華北剿總司令傅作義移交了550噸軍火。這批軍火價值1.25億美元，是《援華法案》的第一批援助。蔣介石通過黃葛向傅作義保證，後續的軍火將源源不斷地運抵。但幾天後，傅作義開城投降，這批援華物資也落入了中共手中。宋美齡親自赴美游說。但杜魯門對宋美齡的遊說回應有限。最终，美國對華援助的力度和效率都遠遠未能達到國民黨的需求。
